title: Warfare Wings
description: Add a WWII reciprocating fighter to the Immersive Aircraft Mod.
body:
![P-51D](https://i.ibb.co/Gf5sywwZ/2025-11-22-17-38-21.jpg)

Warfare Wings is an add-on to Immersive Aircraft Mod that adds fighter aircraft from WWII. A total of 23 aircraft models are added, with three paint scheme variations per model. Some of the paint schemes do not exist in the historical record. Please understand this in advance. We plan to add even more new aircraft and updates in the future. However, please note that the frequency of updates will be quite infrequent.

![Spitfire/P-40](https://i.ibb.co/4DfsZGg/2025-11-22-17-37-00.jpg)

#
**Included Aircraft**

**United States**
- F6F Hellcat
- P-40E Warhawk
- P-47N Thunderbolt
- P-51D Mustang
- F4U Corsair
- SBD Dauntless
- B-17 Flying Fortress
- B-29 Super Fortress

**Japan**
- A6M Zero
- Kawasaki Ki-61 Hien
- Nakajima Ki-84 Hayate
- Yokosuka D4Y Suisei
- Mitsubishi G4M
- Nakajima G10N Fugaku

**German**
- Messerschmitt Bf 109
- Fw190 Würger
- Ju 87 Stuka
- Heinkel He 111

**Soviet Union**
- MiG-3
- Yak-3
- IL-2 Sturmovik

**United Kingdom**
- Supermarine Spitfire

**Italy**
- C.202 Folgore

# 

**About Functions**

**landing gear**

The fighter in this add-on starts the engines and hides the landing gear after a few seconds or so when the engines reach a certain power level. When engine power is reduced, the landing gear reappears. *We have not tested this in multiplayer, so if you have any problems, please let me know on my Discord server.

**Weapon**

Currently, only two types of weapons can be equipped: bombs and machine guns. Note that the machine gun's ballistic behavior is currently unstable. Regarding bombs, the add-on includes four types (American, Japanese, German, Soviet), all sharing identical damage output and material requirements for their recipes. Additionally, version 1.1 introduced two torpedoes (American, Japanese). Torpedoes are deployed by dropping them into water, where they submerge and travel in the direction they were dropped until colliding with a block, at which point they detonate.

**Recipe**

This add-on has a recipe for survival mode. Please note that this add-on is intended to be used in combination with other mods, so the ingredients required in the recipes are quite large.

**paint scheme variation**

The aircraft included in this add-on contains three different schemes per model. Note that when crafting in survival mode, the material used is wool blocks, not dyes.*Please note that several aircraft have been painted with a different model than the actual aircraft fuselage model.

# 

**Required mods**

This add-on is for the [Immersive Aircraft Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft), so immersive aircraft is absolutely required. Be sure to install it at the same time.

# 

**License**

You are basically free to use this add-on on modpack or youtube, but please make sure to credit this add-on (Warfare Wings) in that case.

Absolutely no re-release of this add-on will be allowed for any reason.

# 

**Credits**

**Thanks to Conczin, author of [Immersive Aircraft Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft), the basis for this add-on, and [Man of Many Planes](https://modrinth.com/mod/man-of-many-planes), on which the add-on was based.**
> **The code on which this project is based is solely the work of Man of Many Planes and its author, Conczin. I, VellEagle, did not create it on my own.**

# 

Please report any problems to this [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/uSfmTzV5Ef). Basically, we do not accept any requests for aircraft. Please be aware of this.
